phases.title: Before Delivery Prep
phases.description: Steps to take before you arrive and before accepting delivery.

items.title: VIN confirmed
items.description: Verify the VIN on the car matches your order confirmation.

items.title: Monroney sticker present
items.description: The price sticker should be on the window. Note options and pricing.

items.title: Registration and title documents
items.description: Confirm all required registration and title documents are provided.

items.title: Mobile Connector included
items.description: Confirm a Mobile Connector is present in the trunk.

items.title: Floor mats present
items.description: Verify all floor mats are present and correctly fitted.

items.title: Tire repair kit present
items.description: Locate the tire repair kit in the trunk storage area.

phases.title: Locked Exterior
phases.description: Inspect the exterior while the car is locked. Look for paint, glass, and body defects.

items.title: Panel gaps even
items.description: Walk around the car and check all panel gaps are even and consistent. Pay close attention to the trunk lid and door edges.

items.title: Panels flush
items.description: Check that all body panels sit flush with adjacent panels. No panel should protrude or be recessed noticeably.

items.title: Trunk lid gap even
items.description: Model 3 has a traditional trunk lid — check for consistent gap on all four sides of the trunk opening.

items.title: Headlight fit
items.description: Check both headlight assemblies are flush with surrounding body panels and aligned evenly.

items.title: Taillight bar fit
items.description: Check the full-width rear taillight bar for flush fit and even alignment. No gaps or lifting at the edges.

items.title: No paint chips or scratches
items.description: Inspect all painted surfaces for chips, scratches, or scuffs. Use bright light. Check door edges and corners.

items.title: No paint runs or drips
items.description: Look for paint runs, drips, or orange peel texture, particularly on vertical surfaces.

items.title: No overspray on trim
items.description: Check plastic trim and rubber seals for paint overspray.

items.title: Color consistency
items.description: Verify paint color is consistent across all panels. No mismatched panels indicating prior repair.

items.title: Windshield no chips or cracks
items.description: Inspect the entire windshield for chips, cracks, or stress fractures.

items.title: Glass roof intact (if equipped)
items.description: If optioned with a glass roof, inspect for chips, cracks, or delamination across the full pane.

items.title: Rear window intact
items.description: Check the rear windshield for chips or cracks.

items.title: Window trim aligned
items.description: Check all window trim and bright accents for dents, scratches, or misalignment.

items.title: Badging correctly placed
items.description: Check Tesla T logo front and rear. Model 3 typically has no model badge on the exterior.

items.title: Door handles retracted and flush
items.description: With the car locked, all door handles should be retracted and flush with the door surface.

items.title: Wheel finish undamaged
items.description: Inspect all four wheels for curb rash, scratches, or finish damage.

items.title: Tires no damage
items.description: Check all four tires for sidewall damage, uneven wear, or embedded objects.

items.title: Tire pressure correct
items.description: Check that all tires appear correctly inflated. Confirm on dashboard after unlocking.

phases.title: Unlocked Exterior
phases.description: Inspect with doors open and frunk/trunk accessible.

items.title: All doors open and close smoothly
items.description: Open and close all four doors. Each should open smoothly and latch firmly without excessive force.

items.title: Door seals seated correctly
items.description: Inspect rubber door seals for tears, misalignment, or areas that are not seated correctly.

items.title: Door alignment flush when closed
items.description: Open and reclose each door and check alignment is flush with adjacent panels.

items.title: Headlights operational
items.description: Turn on headlights and verify both low and high beam work on each side.

items.title: Taillights and brake lights operational
items.description: Verify taillights, brake lights, and reverse lights all function correctly.

items.title: Turn signals operational
items.description: Test all four turn signals and the hazard lights.

items.title: Fog/DRL lights operational
items.description: Verify front DRL and rear fog lights work from the display.

items.title: Frunk opens and closes correctly
items.description: Open and close the frunk. It should latch securely and sit flush when closed. Check the secondary latch engagement.

items.title: Frunk interior paint and liner
items.description: Inspect frunk interior for paint damage, dents, or missing liner material.

items.title: Frunk drain holes clear
items.description: Check drain holes in the frunk for debris or blockage.

items.title: Trunk lid opens and closes correctly
items.description: Model 3 has a traditional trunk lid. Test opening and closing — it should latch firmly and sit flush.

items.title: Trunk seal complete
items.description: Verify the trunk weather seal is properly seated and unbroken around the entire opening.

phases.title: Interior and Controls
phases.description: Inspect the cabin, seats, trim, screen, and all controls.

items.title: Front seats no damage
items.description: Inspect seat upholstery for cuts, stains, uneven stitching, or loose panels.

items.title: Rear seats no damage
items.description: Inspect rear seat upholstery and fold-down mechanism.

items.title: Seat adjustment works
items.description: Test powered seat adjustment for all positions: forward/back, up/down, recline.

items.title: Seat heating works (if equipped)
items.description: Enable seat heating from the display and verify both front seats heat.

items.title: Dashboard panels fit and flush
items.description: Check dashboard panels for consistent fit, gaps, or misalignment.

items.title: Door panels properly fitted
items.description: Check all four door panels for correct fit, no rattles, and no damage.

items.title: Headliner clean and fitted
items.description: Inspect headliner for stains, sagging, or loose edges.

items.title: Carpet clean and fitted
items.description: Check carpet for stains, tears, or misalignment.

items.title: Main touchscreen functional
items.description: Power on and verify the 15.4-inch landscape touchscreen responds accurately to touch across the entire surface.

items.title: No dead pixels on screen
items.description: Check for dead or stuck pixels across the main display at different brightness levels.

items.title: Steering wheel controls responsive
items.description: Test scroll wheels and buttons on the steering wheel.

items.title: Horn works
items.description: Test the horn.

items.title: HVAC heats and cools
items.description: Enable heating and cooling from the display. Verify air comes from correct vents.

items.title: Audio system works
items.description: Play audio through the speakers. Verify all speakers work. Listen for buzzing or distortion.

items.title: Wireless charging works
items.description: Place a Qi-compatible phone on the wireless charging pad and verify it charges.

items.title: USB ports functional
items.description: Test front and rear USB-A and USB-C ports with a device.

items.title: Rear HVAC vents work
items.description: Verify rear passenger HVAC vents are present and deliver airflow.

items.title: Overhead lights work
items.description: Test map lights and dome lights.

items.title: Ambient lighting works
items.description: Enable ambient lighting from the display and verify it illuminates correctly.

phases.title: Trunk and Accessories
phases.description: Inspect cargo areas and verify all accessories are present and functional.

items.title: Trunk floor and liner undamaged
items.description: Inspect cargo floor liner for cuts, stains, or damage.

items.title: Under-trunk storage intact
items.description: Lift the trunk floor panel and check the storage compartment beneath for damage or missing parts.

items.title: Rear seats fold flat
items.description: Test the rear seat fold-down and verify the seats lay flat for maximum cargo space.

items.title: Two key cards present
items.description: Confirm two NFC key cards are included. Test both on the door pillar.

items.title: Phone key paired
items.description: Set up phone key in the Tesla app and verify it unlocks the vehicle.

items.title: Mobile Connector cable intact
items.description: Inspect Mobile Connector cable and adapters for damage.

phases.title: Drive and Final Verification
phases.description: Take a short test drive and complete final system checks.

items.title: Acceleration smooth
items.description: Test acceleration from stop. No shudder, hesitation, or unusual sounds.

items.title: Braking smooth
items.description: Test brakes at low speed. No pulling, grinding, or pulsation.

items.title: Regenerative braking works
items.description: Verify regen braking engages on lift-off with expected deceleration.

items.title: Steering straight with no pull
items.description: Drive straight and verify the car tracks straight without pulling to one side.

items.title: No unusual vibration
items.description: Listen and feel for unusual vibrations from wheels, suspension, or drivetrain at various speeds.

items.title: No unusual noises
items.description: Listen for wind noise, rattles, or squeaks that seem out of place.

items.title: Autopilot/FSD enables
items.description: Test Autopilot or FSD engagement on an appropriate road. Verify cameras are clear.

items.title: All cameras functional
items.description: Access the camera view on the display and verify all cameras (front, sides, rear) display correctly.

items.title: GPS/Navigation accurate
items.description: Open navigation and verify GPS lock is acquired and location is accurate.

items.title: Software up to date
items.description: Check Software settings panel for current version and any pending updates.

items.title: Odometer reading reasonable
items.description: Verify odometer reading is low and consistent with a new delivery (under 50 miles typically).
